item.title: Regular Expressions
item.description: Description ^ Matches the beginning of line $ Matches the end of line . Mathes any character \s Matches whitespace; equivalent to [\t\n\r\f\v] \S Matches any NON-Whitespace; equivalent to [^\t\n\r\f\v] * Zero or more time; Repeats a character *? Zero or more times; NON-GREEDY; Repeats a character + One or More times; Repeats a character +?
